task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into the FreeScout helpdesk interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the FreeScout web interface showing a dashboard, mailbox list, or user profile indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'AV Service Desk' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'AV Service Desk' highlighted or selected in the mailbox navigation sidebar or header.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct conversation from Rachel Torres.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the conversation titled 'Projector Maintenance Request - Conference Room B' opened in the main viewing area, showing Rachel Torres as the customer.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent used the 'Maintenance Appointment Confirmation' saved reply template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the specific phrases 'scheduled your equipment maintenance appointment', 'certified technician will arrive', and 'powered off and accessible' in the reply draft or the final sent message.

task_completion.description: Verify the reply was actually sent to the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the reply message appearing in the conversation history as a completed/sent message (e.g., added to the thread with a timestamp), not just sitting as unsent text in the reply input box.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeScout web graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a standard web browser interface interacting with FreeScout, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the reply was drafted and sent within the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the text is entered into the FreeScout reply box and not a separate text editor or notepad application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the sent message.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) open in the screenshots that could be used to manipulate the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires replying to a conversation in FreeScout. Mailbox: 'AV Service Desk'. Conversation Subject: 'Projector Maintenance Request - Conference Room B'. Customer: Rachel Torres (rachel.torres@meridianav.com). The reply must use the 'Maintenance Appointment Confirmation' saved reply template, which contains the exact phrases: 'scheduled your equipment maintenance appointment', 'certified technician will arrive', and 'powered off and accessible'. The agent must be logged in as admin@helpdesk.local.
